exercises.title: Vowel to Vowel Linking
exercises.instruction: Practice linking vowels with a slight 'j' or 'w' sound.
tips: Add a slight 'y' sound between 'appreciate' and 'your': appreciate_your

exercises.title: Phrasal Verbs
exercises.instruction: Practice stress in phrasal verbs. The particle usually gets stress.
exercises.targetText: We need to follow_up on the action items.
tips: Phrasal verb 'follow up' stresses the particle: up

exercises.title: Step-by-Step Instructions
exercises.targetText: Here's the process. First, review the document. Second, add your comments. Third, send it to the team.
chunks: Third, send it to the team.
tips: Use sequential markers: First, Second, Third
Each step is a separate thought group
Stress: process, review, document, add, comments, send, team

exercises.title: Summarizing Points
exercises.instruction: Shadow this summary. Use a clear, concluding tone.
exercises.targetText: To summarize, we've covered three key areas.
tips: Use a concluding tone to signal the end
Stress: summarize, covered, three, key, areas

exercises.title: Listing Items
exercises.targetText: We need time, resources, and support.
tips: Rise on each item: time ↗, resources ↗
Fall on the final item: support ↘
